reviews.review_description: I had a fun time while I was waiting on something. I clicked out of a whim to toy a but more with MR games out there. The mechanics are simple and it instantly throws you into the game without much setup hassle. Given that you already got a room setup ready. I haven hit the 10k destroyed bots just yet.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review. We hope you continue to enjoy playing the game. We can't wait to release the new updates that will introduce lots of new content.

reviews.review_title: A nice little MR game with huge potentia
reviews.review_description: The game is very nicely done. The robots are cute but dangerous! The game has a very smooth handling, the shots are accurate. It certainly has a big potential if the developers keep up the work at the level this version is done now. I am already looking forward for new updates!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! We can't wait to publish the next updates, we hope you enjoy them!

reviews.review_description:
Wow, this is the land of endless possibilities - with a solid, entertaining foundation/framework and an enthusiastic developer eager to expand on the core concept, this combination should act like a magnet, attracting anyone dreaming of their ultimate mixed reality ("spatial") shooter.

My wishlist is already endless: I want to annihilate those annoying little bots with the most diverse weapons, which I hope can be further upgraded; I want to have to reload, fight boss enemies, deploy shields... there are so many incredible ways and directions to take this, and I'm sure it will happen, because the creator probably has enough ideas for years, maybe even decades.

I'm curious to see where the journey of this little, charming game will take us.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review! We hope you can continue playing Boom Bots while we work on the new updates and we can assure you that we will exceed your expectations.

reviews.review_description: Great fun! I hope they add more guns and stuff in the future

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! With the future updates we will introduce a lot of new weapons.

reviews.review_description: Beautiful game, fantastic models and textures, beautiful animations, dynamic and fun gameplay. The global ranking and objectives give an extra boost. You can tell that the developers paid a lot of attention to detail!

developer_response.body: Thanks, we are working for the new update!
